title: Lovely Crispy Venezuelan Beef Skewers
description: A show-off Venezuelan dish featuring mixed beef cuts, this recipe combines floral and crispy elements in a FODMAP-friendly way, perfect for special occasions.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together lime juice, olive oil, garlic-infused oil, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the mixed beef cuts to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Thread the marinated beef pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking and grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
During the last 2 minutes of grilling, brush the skewers with additional garlic-infused oil if desired.
Once cooked, remove the skewers from the grill and garnish with chopped cilantro and parsley.
